string.text: Found %s's body in %s. He was with the %s. Rot in hell. One less enemy to worry about.
One more %s who crossed the line. Fell in %s. He was with the %s, good riddance, hope he rots in the Zone.
Death reported: %s fell in %s, he was with the %s. Doesn't bother me, one less scumbag.
Remember %s? Turned up dead in %s, was with the %s. Don't expect any tears from me.
Get this: %s caught a bullet in %s, was with the %s. Makes my day to announce it.
Justice from above. %s showed up dead in %s, was with the %s. Let the Zone judge him.
Got a happy report: %s ain't bothering anyone anymore. Found him in %s, was with the %s. Well deserved.
%s rests in peace forever in %s. Was with the %s. Hope hell exists for scum like him.
